project.name: AEM Loki Integrator - Core Bundle
project.description: OSGi bundle that forwards every AEM/Sling/Felix log event to a Grafana Loki push endpoint. The forwarder subscribes to the standard OSGi Log Reader Service and pushes batched events over java.net.http, so the bundle has zero compile-time or runtime dependency on Logback, SLF4J internals, or any third-party logging library. This keeps AEMaaCS Code Quality rule S1874 green. All runtime settings come from a single OSGi configuration.

configuration.bnd:
Bundle-SymbolicName: ${project.artifactId} Bundle-Name: ${project.name} Bundle-Version: ${project.version}
# Hard veto on any package header AEMaaCS Code Quality rule S1874 would # flag as deprecated. The forwarder uses only the SLF4J facade (for its # own diagnostics), java.nio.file / java.net.http to tail log files and # push them, and the OSGi DS / Metatype annotations for wiring. No OSGi # Log Service, no SLF4J SPI, no Logback. Import-Package: !ch.qos.logback.*,\ !org.apache.sling.commons.log.*,\ !org.slf4j.spi,\ !org.slf4j.helpers,\ !org.slf4j.impl,\ !org.osgi.service.log.*,\ !com.github.loki4j.*,\ org.slf4j;version="[1.7,2)",\ *
